name: Mason Cruz
learned: Mason Cruz is a quiet and introspective boy who often experiences strange dreams and visions. These dreams seem to provide him with hints about the town's hidden powers and the dimensional gateways. His intuition helps the group navigate through dangerous situations, although he doesn't fully understand the meaning of his visions.
currently: Mason Cruz is currently struggling to make sense of his mysterious dreams and their connection to the dimensional gateways. He is often the first to sense when something is wrong, though he keeps his thoughts to himself, adding an air of mystery to the group.
lifestyle: Mason's days are often spent in solitude, reflecting on his dreams and attempting to interpret their meaning. He tends to be quiet around the group, only speaking when necessary. At night, he struggles to sleep, haunted by vivid visions that seem to be guiding him towards something important.
